problem id: 8ac1a11a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  01110010 -> 00111101
  10000110 -> 01100011
  11000110 -> 01110011
  10011011 -> 11101111
  10010100 -> 01101111
  10111010 -> 01111111
  11101101 -> 11111111
  01011111 -> 10111111
  11101011 -> 11111111

query: 11100110
predicted answer: 01111011
